CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Aug-29-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant James Gutierrez.
Dept. 514. Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768. Email: casey.giselle@gmail.com.

W. Ernest Mooney, Esq. appeared via CourtCall for plaintiff Sven Engdahl AB, who was not present for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant James Gutierrez.
Plaintiff Complaint for Breach of Promissory Note and Common Counts was filed on December 18, 2018.
Substitute service on defendant James Gutierrez was made on January 8, 2019 and was effectuated on January 20, 2019.
Default as to defendant James Gutierrez was entered on March 8, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on May 1, 2019.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on July 19, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Sven Engdahl AB, and against the default defendant James Gutierrez, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $274,860.45.
Costs - $553.90.

Total - $275,414.35.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jul-30-2019 Continued To Aug-29-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-06-2019 Continued To Sep-18-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
